history.title: Booking history
history.subtitle: See your confirmed and past appointments without creating an account.
history.prompt: Open the magic link from your email or look up your bookings using the reference, email and phone number.

liquid.homeDesc: A luxury salon in Kosice with clear navigation, instant booking, and a cleaner product-like experience for clients and staff.
liquid.modulesDesc: Each card works as a structured PAPI HAIR DESIGN module and keeps the homepage readable, premium, and ready to scale.
liquid.showcaseDesc: The selected content appears inside one premium panel so the homepage stays clear on mobile and desktop.
liquid.trustDesc: The landing page now feels more like a finished product while still preserving the luxury PAPI identity.
liquid.trustLuxuryDesc: PAPI HAIR DESIGN stays at the center and the layout supports the brand instead of competing with it.
liquid.trustClarityDesc: Clients can instantly find hours, pricing, booking, and contact details without unnecessary searching.
liquid.trustScaleDesc: The structure is cleaner, repeatable, and much better suited as a base for future salon SaaS rollout.
liquid.ctaTitle: Booking for clients, entry for the team
liquid.ctaDesc: One entry page for both customers and owners, without losing the premium feel or adding visual chaos.
liquid.priceNote: Prices are subject to change based on hair length and complexity.

demo.heroSub: Bookings, calendar, and team in one place
demo.heroDesc: PAPI Hair Design combines online booking, daily calendar, and service management into one simple system. Fewer phone calls, less chaos, more time for clients.
demo.heroPoint1: Clients book online without calling the salon.
demo.heroPoint2: Your team sees a clear daily plan in one place.
demo.heroPoint3: The owner keeps services, pricing, and performance under control.
demo.heroPoint4: The platform is ready for everyday salon operation.
demo.ownerDesc: You stay in control of what happens in your salon today and tomorrow.
demo.ownerBenefit1: Calendar, services, and team in one place.
demo.ownerBenefit2: Quick updates to price, duration, and availability.
demo.ownerBenefit3: Less manual coordination during the day.
demo.ownerBenefit4: Clear reservations view without message or call chaos.
demo.ownerBenefit5: One system for decisions and operational control.
demo.ownerImpact: Better operations and more time to grow the salon.
demo.employeeDesc: Each team member knows who is coming and what to prepare.
demo.employeeBenefit1: Clear daily schedule without back-and-forth calls.
demo.employeeBenefit4: Quick view of free and booked time slots.
demo.employeeBenefit5: More time for clients, less admin overhead.
demo.employeeImpact: Smoother day and better service quality.
demo.customerDesc: Booking is fast, clear, and does not require waiting for a reply.
demo.customerBenefit1: Simple choice of service, time, and specialist.
demo.customerBenefit3: Better booking confidence from the first click.
demo.customerBenefit4: Booking works smoothly on mobile too.
demo.customerImpact: Higher trust and more completed bookings.
demo.pack1Desc: Clients choose service and time in just a few clicks.
demo.pack1Impact: Fewer phone interruptions and faster conversions.
demo.pack2Desc: Owners and staff see the day clearly in one view.
demo.pack3Desc: Each role sees what they need for their work.
demo.pack4Desc: Manage names, prices, and offers without complexity.
demo.pack4Impact: Up-to-date offers clients can easily understand.
demo.pack5Desc: Built for real day-to-day salon operation.
demo.pack5Impact: More stable operations and less improvisation.
demo.pack6Desc: Important booking updates are available in time for both staff and clients.
demo.pack6Impact: Fewer missed appointments and smoother daily flow.
demo.pack7Desc: Comfortable on desktop and phone, inside or outside the salon.
demo.featLead: These are the results salons usually feel after rollout.
demo.feat1Sub: Appointments are in one place, not spread across messages.
demo.feat2Sub: Everyone knows what is coming in the next hours.
demo.feat3Sub: You can make faster decisions with current data.
demo.feat4Sub: Less waiting and less manual confirmation work.
demo.feat5Sub: The platform works smoothly on phones too.
demo.feat6Sub: Ready for regular daily use by the salon team.
demo.feat7Sub: Clients can start booking instantly via QR code.
demo.feat8: Clear next step for each role
demo.feat8Sub: Owner, employee, and client all know where to click next.
demo.keyFn1: Online service booking based on real available slots
demo.keyFn2: Admin calendar with team and reservation overview
demo.keyFn4: Role-based flow for owner, employee, and customer
demo.keyFn5: Daily operations visibility for better team planning
demo.keyFn6: Mobile usability for fast work during the day
demo.qrTitle: Ready for sales and real daily operation
demo.qrDesc: Scan the QR and test the booking flow from a customer perspective. Or open team login and try the admin side.
demo.footer: PAPI Hair Design · SaaS platform for modern salon operations

offline.title: You're offline
offline.message: Reception mode works without internet. Changes will sync when you're back online.

install.title: Install the app for the best booking experience

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: PAPI Hair Design · booking.papihairdesign.sk
privacy.s1Body: The data controller is PAPI Hair Design, Trieda SNP 61, Košice. Contact: papihairdesign@gmail.com.
privacy.s2Body: First name, last name, email, phone number (optional), booking history. Technical data: IP address, browser type, session cookies.
privacy.s3Body: Booking management (contract performance, Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Marketing communication only with consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). Legal obligations.
privacy.s4Body: We use functional cookies (login, language setting) and a marketing consent audit table. No analytics or advertising cookies without your consent.
privacy.s5Body: Google Firebase (cloud database and authentication). Vercel Inc. (hosting). No other third parties without your consent.
privacy.s6Body: Bookings: 3 years from last activity. Marketing consent: until withdrawal. Logs: 90 days.
privacy.s7Body: Access to data: GET /gdpr/status · Export: GET /gdpr/export · Deletion: DELETE /gdpr/delete. Withdraw consent at any time. Complaint: Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic.
privacy.s8Body: We will inform you of any changes by email or in-app notification.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: PAPI Hair Design · booking.papihairdesign.sk
terms.s1Body: By using the PAPI Hair Design online booking system, you agree to these terms. The system is operated by PAPI Hair Design, Trieda SNP 61, Košice.
terms.s2Body: An online booking is binding upon confirmation by email. The salon reserves the right to decline a booking for capacity reasons or breach of terms.
terms.s3Body: You may cancel or change a booking at least 24 hours before the appointment. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee.
terms.s4Body: Processing of personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy available on this website.
terms.s5Body: PAPI Hair Design is not liable for damages resulting from system outages, force majeure, or losses caused by improper use of the application.
terms.s6Body: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. The current version is always available on this page.

salonLogin.heroDesc: The owner gets the full overview, while staff members only see their own bookings. Clean, premium, and safe on every screen size.
salonLogin.heroStatOwnerDesc: Sees the full calendar, all staff members, and every reservation.
salonLogin.heroStatTeamDesc: Miška and Maťo only see their own bookings and daily workflow.
salonLogin.heroStatMobileDesc: Clean layout for phone, tablet, and desktop without extra noise.
salonLogin.gateHint: First enter the access password to unlock staff profiles.
salonLogin.introDesc: Open the team area, pick a profile, and continue straight to the admin calendar.
salonLogin.pickerDesc: Choose a team member below and continue to secure sign in.
salonLogin.teamDescLocked: Unlock the profiles with the access password first.
salonLogin.teamDescReady: Choose who is about to sign in to the calendar.
salonLogin.accessOwnerDesc: Full calendar, all staff, every reservation, and the complete business overview.
salonLogin.accessStaffDesc: Each staff member only sees their own reservations and daily plan.
salonLogin.accessMobileDesc: Optimized for phone, tablet, and desktop without horizontal scrolling.
salonLogin.quote: Behind every perfect cut is a hand that does it with heart.
salonLogin.loginDesc: After successful access, we open the admin calendar.

admin.newBookingDialogDescription: Create a booking directly from the dashboard. The client stays anonymous and no magic-link email is sent.
